name: LangChain Safe Baseline
description: Deterministic blocks for dangerous LangChain tool calls (bash, env reads, unwhitelisted HTTP)

rules.name: Block Destructive Bash
rules.message: Destructive shell commands are not permitted.

rules.name: Block Environment Access
rules.message: Access to environment and secret files is restricted.

rules.name: Block Unprotected SSH
rules.message: SSH tool calls require humanitarian approval.
